items.title: Related Experience
items.content:
Launch Lab, University of Rhode Island, Kingston, RI

Ambassador

May 2024 - present
  • Promote Launch Lab informing College of Business of Blab's resources and programming
  • Supervise Launch Lab space in Carothers Library Attend Innovate at URI events
  • Recommend new activities, workshops, hackathons to help grow participation and awareness
  • Participate in weekly Innovation Ambassador meetings to share activity, successes, and challenges
  • ﻿﻿Onboard and serve as mentor to six new ambassadors

Office Assistant

June 2021 - April 2024
  • ﻿﻿Observed consultations with local small businesses
  • ﻿﻿Utilized Excel to track small business interactions, analyzing presenting needs & trends
  • ﻿﻿Created PowerPoint presentation demonstrating utilization of services
  • ﻿﻿Attended Chamber of Commerce events promoting SBD
Del's Lemonade, Narragansett, RI

Mobile Unit Driver

June 2020 - July 2021

  • ﻿﻿Sold product at Narragansett Beach during summer months Managed financial records and maintained register receipts
  • ﻿﻿Drove truck to and from sales locations on daily basis
  • ﻿﻿Learned importance of pricing and positioning product Gained understanding of family-owned/franchise operations
